personal.name: Sujat
personal.title: Software developer and designer by day. Fiction reader by night. Somewhere in between is where I live.
personal.tagline: I build projects — some for clients, most just because. Creating more than I consume.
personal.bio: I'm a developer who builds projects — for clients, for fun, and for the challenge of it. I'm always learning — mostly by shipping things and figuring it out as I go.

projects.description: Autonomous AI pentesting agent that probes web applications for security vulnerabilities and generates severity-scored forensic reports — governed in real time by the ArmorIQ SDK for intent drift detection.

A modern music streaming app reimagined in the design language of the mid-2000s web. One React engine — real search, playback, playlists, and an AI DJ — wrapped in three completely different retro skins you can switch between live.
Personal portfolio built with React and Framer Motion — features scroll-driven animations, a scramble text effect, and a dark editorial aesthetic.
High-performance web platform for a premium aluminium & uPVC solutions business — rich animations, category-filtered galleries, and direct WhatsApp enquiries.
Full-stack e-commerce platform for a thrift store — product listings, cart, Razorpay payments, Cloudinary image management, and automated email notifications.
An autonomous AI agent for Windows that automates complex tasks through natural language using voice interaction, multi-step reasoning, and an integrated HUD dashboard.
A tiny open-source tool that scans your Instagram DMs and roasts your chat game with brutal honesty.
